reasoning: Today we'll target your lactate clearance limiter by focusing on improving your aerobic base and fatigue resistance. Your last ride showed consistent endurance but we need to focus on boosting sustained power targets for the Alpine Loop's key climb.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3 sets of 8-minute over-unders: alternate 2 min at 218W, 2 min at 250W, followed by 3 min recovery at 209W. Repeat for 3 sets.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
